channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fish kill reported in Baroy and Tubod in Lanao del Norte linked to red tide
item.description: Authorities in Northern Mindanao have reported fish kill incidents in the coastal towns of Baroy and Tubod in Lanao del Norte. The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) said the incidents a...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee condemns attack on Abhishek Banerjee; political lines drawn after post-poll violence reports
item.description: The incident in Sonarpur, West Bengal, where Abhishek Banerjee, a senior Trinamool Congress leader, was allegedly assaulted during a visit to meet families affected by post-poll violence, prompted a h...

item.title: Adekunle Gold hosts Lagos dinner to mark Macallan brand ambassador partnership
item.description: Nigerian singer and songwriter Adekunle Gold hosted an exclusive and intimate dinner in Lagos to officially celebrate his new partnership with The Macallan, a globally recognised single-malt Scotch wh...

item.title: Research Explores How GLP-1 Drugs Like Ozempic May Affect Brain Function
item.description: Recent studies have revealed that GLP-1 medications, such as Ozempic, may have effects on the brain beyond their established roles in metabolism, hunger control, and blood sugar regulation. A small st...

item.title: Arsenal lead PSG early in Champions League final after Kai Havertz strike in Budapest
item.description: The live coverage of the UEFA Champions League final between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal reports an early breakthrough for the English side in Budapest. Kai Havertz gave Arsenal the lead in the op...

item.title: Experts question durability of Trump IRS settlement granting tax protections and ending audits
item.description: According to reporting cited from The Wall Street Journal, President Donald Trump has reached an unusual agreement with the U.S. Department of Justice that effectively halts ongoing IRS audits of his ...

item.title: TWAD Board mandates regular water quality testing and infrastructure improvements in Virudhunagar district
item.description: The Managing Director of the Tamil Nadu Water Supply and Drainage (TWAD) Board, Dinesh Ponraj Oliver, has emphasised the importance of conducting regular quality tests of potable water in municipal ar...

item.title: AUKUS partners expand underwater drone and submarine cooperation in new defence agreement
item.description: The United States, the United Kingdom and Australia have announced a strengthened defence cooperation agreement focused on undersea warfare capabilities, including the development of advanced uncrewed...

item.title: Ransomware Group Claims MyPillow Breach Amid Broader Cybersecurity and Surveillance Developments
item.description: This week’s cybersecurity roundup highlights a series of developments spanning ransomware threats, surveillance technology concerns, and evolving law enforcement tools. A Russian-language ransomware g...

item.title: Thee Pluto Shares Struggles in Co-Parenting with Felicity Shiru
item.description: YouTuber Thee Pluto has recently shared his emotional struggles regarding not being able to see his second child with Felicity Shiru. The couple separated in September 2024 after three years together,...

item.title: Prime Minister directs reform of deputy mayor and district council election process
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed the Minister of State in the PMO-RALG to review and amend the law governing elections of Deputy Mayors and Vice-Chairpersons of district councils. He h...

item.title: Teenager dies after being pulled from Nottinghamshire lake during hot weather
item.description: A 19-year-old man has died after being rescued from Balderton Lake in New Balderton, Nottinghamshire, following an incident in which he was pulled from the water during hot weather conditions. Emergen...

item.title: Trillanes expresses openness to Senate investigation sought by Marcoleta
item.description: Former Senator Antonio Trillanes IV has expressed his willingness to take part in a possible Senate investigation after being challenged by Senator Rodante Marcoleta. In a brief but direct statement, ...

item.title: U.S. interest rises in expanded Canadian citizenship-by-descent rules, IRCC data shows
item.description: Recent data from Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) indicates a sharp increase in approvals for proof of Canadian citizenship by descent following changes to eligibility rules. The up...

item.title: ANC Women’s League considers response after Tolashe found guilty of misconduct
item.description: The ANC Women’s League (ANCWL) is deliberating on its next steps following a report by the ANC Integrity Commission, which found its president, Sisisi Tolashe, guilty of misconduct in public office. T...

item.title: Experts explain why lower global crude oil prices may not immediately reduce fuel prices in Tanzania
item.description: Although global crude oil prices have dropped from about $112.9 per barrel in early April 2026 to around $87.3 per barrel by late May 2026, experts say this decline is unlikely to quickly reduce fuel ...

item.title: Jinggoy Estrada Faces Third Plunder Case Over Flood Control Projects
item.description: Senator Jinggoy Estrada, son of former president Joseph Estrada, is facing a third plunder case in under three decades, this time related to alleged corruption in flood control projects in Bulacan. On...

item.title: Two passengers die after vehicle plunges into river in Oyo State accident
item.description: The Oyo State Fire Service has confirmed the death of two passengers after a Toyota Avensis plunged into a river at Ariyo River along Amuloko in Ona Ara Local Government Area of Oyo State on Friday ni...

item.title: Opinion: Trump Cabinet meeting criticized for excessive praise and political sycophancy
item.description: This opinion piece analyzes a recent Trump Cabinet meeting held at the White House, focusing on what the author describes as an extraordinary level of praise directed at the president by senior admini...

item.title: Kenyan single mother in the US shares her experience balancing work and parenting
item.description: Milka Nduta, a Kenyan woman currently living and working in the United States, has opened up about her life as a single mother trying to balance professional responsibilities with raising her child. I...
